title: AI SaaS Model Comparison Dashboard

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: AI SaaS Model Comparison Dashboard

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'><rect x='10' y='10' width='380' height='280' fill='#090a0f'/><g fill='#B7D7CD'><circle cx='100' cy='50' r='30'/><circle cx='220' cy='50' r='30'/><circle cx='340' cy='50' r='30'/></g><g fill='#C06C88'><text x='70' y='80' font-size='20'>Select Model</text><text x='200' y='80' font-size='20'>Compare Models</text></g><path d='M 100 150 L 220 150 L 220 220' stroke='#411C56' stroke-width='2'/><path d='M 100 150 L 220 150 L 220 220' stroke='#411C56' stroke-width='2'/><text x='120' y='180' font-size='18'>Model 1</text><text x='240' y='180' font-size='18'>Model 2</text></svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must use the specified color palette throughout the design.
The dashboard should be fully interactive with state updates when selecting models and filters.
The layout should match the provided visual mockup with precise positioning and alignment.

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: AI SaaS Model Comparison Dashboard

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, model selection, and filter functionality.
Review code cleanliness, proper state management, and efficient code structure.
